title: Dig It Out
summary:
Main
Guinea in West Africa has emerged to become a significant player in the mining industry. At a time when the world is torn between economical accomplishment and environmental concerns, it might be that the African country's mining projects will timely come to rescue and satisfy these two goals. Adding to that, the new mines introduce a completely new trade flow for iron ore, the key raw material for steel production.
